Kaleo Church

Car Maintenance Help

Need help with vehicle maintenance? Submit a request and our team will coordinate with men in the church who can help.

How This Works

  1. Your request is saved in your browser and prepared for email delivery to the church.
  2. After submitting, your email app opens with the request details addressed to info@kaleoalaska.org.
  3. The team can also view submissions from the Team Portal on this device.

Kaleo Church

Kaleo Church in Anchorage, Alaska. Following Jesus together. Gathering on Sundays at 10:00 AM.

Plan Your Visit

Contact: info@kaleoalaska.org · (907) 555-0123
